executive_summary: Build failure detected in attempt 3 due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch configuration error. The workflow dispatch API is returning HTTP 500 errors, indicating a server-side or configuration issue preventing the build workflow from being triggered.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Dispatch Failure
errors.description: Failed to dispatch GitHub Actions workflow due to HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. The workflow dispatch API endpoint is returning server errors, preventing the build from being triggered.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Failed to run workflow dispatch","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"500"}
errors.root_cause: Workflow dispatch API failure - possible causes: 1) Workflow file path encoding issue (URL encoded path), 2) Workflow file does not exist or is malformed, 3) Insufficient permissions to dispatch workflow, 4) GitHub API service degradation
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage - no builds can be triggered until workflow dispatch is fixed

steps: 2. Check workflow file syntax and structure
5. Check repository settings allow Actions workflows
6. Validate workflow file path is not URL encoded in API calls
automated_fix.remediation_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Workflow Dispatch Fix Script
echo 'Checking workflow file existence...'
if [ ! -f .github/workflows/build.yml ]; then
  echo 'ERROR: build.yml not found'
  exit 1
fi
echo 'Validating workflow syntax...'
yq eval '.on.workflow_dispatch' .github/workflows/build.yml
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo 'ERROR: workflow_dispatch trigger not configured'
  exit 1
fi
echo 'Workflow configuration validated successfully'
manual_steps: Verify GitHub token permissions in repository secrets
Check GitHub Actions status page for service issues
Review repository Actions settings and permissions

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error detected in automated build pipeline monitoring. Workflow dispatch failure logged for compliance review.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerability detected. Configuration issue only.
compliance_notes.change_control: Requires change request for workflow configuration modifications
compliance_notes.sla_impact: Critical - Build pipeline unavailable, affecting deployment SLA

historical_context.pattern: Consistent failure across all attempts with identical error message

blocking_issues: GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API failure
recommended_actions: Verify workflow file exists and is properly configured
